ast.name: error
ast.source: Binding expression cannot contain chained expression
ast.target: 绑定表达式不能包含链式表达式

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot have a pipe in an action expression
ast.target: 操作表达式中不能包含管道符

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unary operator used immediately before exponentiation expression. Parenthesis must be used to disambiguate operator precedence
ast.target: 一元运算符不能直接用于指数表达式之前。必须使用括号来消除运算符优先级的歧义

ast.name: error
ast.source: The '?.' operator cannot be used in the assignment

ast.name: error
ast.source: Spread element must start with '...' operator
ast.target: 展开元素必须以 '...' 运算符开头

ast.name: error
ast.source: Template literal interpolation cannot be empty
ast.target: 模板字面量插值不能为空

ast.name: error
ast.target: 无名称的 At 规则

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected a backslash preceding the semicolon.
ast.target: 需要在分号前使用反斜杠。

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
Since Acorn 8.0.0, options.ecmaVersion is required.
Defaulting to 2020, but this will stop working in the future.
ast.target: 自 Acorn 8.0.0 起，需要 options.ecmaVersion。\n默认为 2020，但这在未来将停止工作。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to format file, see the Developer console for more details
ast.target: 格式化文件失败，请查看开发者控制台获取更多详情

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check whether the file's first docblock comment contains '@noprettier' or '@noformat' to determine if it should be formatted.
ast.target: 检查文件的第一个文档块注释是否包含 '@noprettier' 或 '@noformat' 以确定是否应进行格式化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Print (to stderr) where a cursor at the given position would move to after formatting.
ast.target: 将给定位置的光标在格式化后将移动到的位置打印（到标准错误）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which end of line characters to apply.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Line Feed only (\n), common on Linux and macOS as well as inside git repos
ast.target: 仅换行符 (\\n)，在 Linux 和 macOS 以及 git 仓库中常见

ast.name: description
ast.source: Carriage Return + Line Feed characters (\r\n), common on Windows
ast.target: 回车 + 换行符 (\\r\\n)，在 Windows 中常见

ast.name: description
ast.source: Carriage Return character only (\r), used very rarely

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Maintain existing
(mixed values within one file are normalised by looking at what's used after the first line)
ast.target: 保持现有\n（通过查看第一行之后使用的字符来标准化单个文件中的混合值）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specify the input filepath. This will be used to do parser inference.
ast.target: 指定输入文件路径。这将用于进行解析器推断。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Insert @format pragma into file's first docblock comment.
ast.target: 在文件的第一个文档块注释中插入 @format 编译指示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a plugin. Multiple plugins can be passed as separate `--plugin`s.
ast.target: 添加插件。多个插件可以作为单独的 `--plugin` 传递。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The line length where Prettier will try wrap.
ast.target: Prettier 将尝试换行的行长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Format code ending at a given character offset (exclusive).
The range will extend forwards to the end of the selected statement.
ast.target: 格式化代码，结束于给定字符偏移量（不包括）。\n该范围将向前延伸到所选语句的末尾。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Format code starting at a given character offset.
The range will extend backwards to the start of the first line containing the selected statement.
ast.target: 格式化代码，开始于给定字符偏移量。\n该范围将向后延伸到包含所选语句的第一行的开头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Require either '@prettier' or '@format' to be present in the file's first docblock comment in order for it to be formatted.
ast.target: 要求文件的第一个文档块注释中存在 '@prettier' 或 '@format' 才能进行格式化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of spaces per indentation level.
ast.target: 每个缩进级别的空格数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indent with tabs instead of spaces.
ast.target: 使用制表符而不是空格进行缩进。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Control how Prettier formats quoted code embedded in the file.
ast.target: 控制 Prettier 如何格式化文件中嵌入的带引号代码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Format embedded code if Prettier can automatically identify it.
ast.target: 如果 Prettier 能自动识别，则格式化嵌入的代码。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 永不自动格式化内嵌代码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keep as multi-line, if there is a newline between the opening brace and first property.
ast.target: 如果左花括号与第一个属性之间有换行，则保持多行格式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fit to a single line when possible.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use single quotes instead of double quotes.
ast.target: 使用单引号代替双引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wrap prose if it exceeds the print width.
ast.target: 如果散文文本超过打印宽度，则进行换行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Put > of opening tags on the last line instead of on a new line.
ast.target: 将开标签的 > 放在最后一行，而不是新行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enforce single attribute per line in HTML, Vue and JSX.
ast.target: 在 HTML、Vue 和 JSX 中强制每行一个属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Include parentheses around a sole arrow function parameter.
ast.target: 在单个箭头函数参数周围添加括号。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 始终包含括号。示例：`(x) => x`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Omit parens when possible. Example: `x => x`
ast.target: 尽可能省略括号。示例：`x => x`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Put > on the last line instead of at a new line.
ast.target: 将 > 放在最后一行，而不是新行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Where to print operators when binary expressions wrap lines.
ast.target: 当二元表达式换行时，操作符打印在哪里。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Print operators at the start of new lines.
ast.target: 在新行的开头打印操作符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Print operators at the end of previous lines.
ast.target: 在前一行的末尾打印操作符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use curious ternaries, with the question mark after the condition.
ast.target: 使用好奇的三元运算符，问号在条件之后。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 在 JSX 中使用单引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Change when properties in objects are quoted.
ast.target: 更改对象属性何时加引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only add quotes around object properties where required.
ast.target: 仅在需要时为对象属性添加引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If at least one property in an object requires quotes, quote all properties.
ast.target: 如果对象中至少有一个属性需要引号，则为所有属性添加引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Respect the input use of quotes in object properties.
ast.target: 尊重输入中对象属性的引号使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Print trailing commas wherever possible when multi-line.
ast.target: 在多行时尽可能打印尾随逗号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trailing commas wherever possible (including function arguments).
ast.target: 尽可能使用尾随逗号（包括函数参数）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trailing commas where valid in ES5 (objects, arrays, etc.)
ast.target: 在 ES5 有效的位置使用尾随逗号（对象、数组等）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How to handle whitespaces in HTML.
ast.target: 如何处理 HTML 中的空白。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Respect the default value of CSS display property.
ast.target: 尊重 CSS display 属性的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indent script and style tags in Vue files.
ast.target: 在 Vue 文件中缩进 script 和 style 标签。

ast.name: message
ast.target: import.meta 只能与 'sourceType: \"module\"' 一起出现。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 'import' 和 'export' 只能与 'sourceType: \"module\"' 一起出现。

ast.name: message
ast.source: A binding pattern parameter cannot be optional in an implementation signature.
ast.target: 绑定模式参数在实现签名中不能是可选的。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid block parameters syntax: expecting the tag to be closed with ">" or "/>" after parameters list
ast.target: 无效的块参数语法：期望在参数列表后用 \">\" 或 \"/>\" 关闭标签。

ast.name: title
ast.source: an array of the following values
